get.summary: List the current user's items (keyset paginated)

403.description: Pro-only type or free-tier item limit reached

get.summary: Get an item's details (fetched on drawer open)

400.description: Current password incorrect or not set
No password set, only sign-in method, or password incorrect

403.description: Email not owned by the user

post.summary: Request a separate credential-login email (sends a confirmation link, or activates instantly when email verification is disabled)

204.description: Confirmation link sent (enumeration-safe), or the login activated instantly when verification is disabled

400.description: Current password required or incorrect (change path re-auth)

409.description: That email is already in use (instant-activation path only)

503.description: Could not send the confirmation email

400.description: Cannot remove the only sign-in method

get.summary: Global fuzzy search across the user's items and collections

post.summary: Issue a presigned S3 upload credential (Pro)

200.description: Presigned POST credentials for the original (and optional thumbnail)

400.description: Disallowed extension or file too large

delete.summary: Delete a pending/orphaned upload by S3 key

403.description: Key does not belong to the user

200.description: The Stripe Checkout URL to redirect to
The Stripe Portal URL to redirect to

post.summary: Schedule subscription cancellation at period end
Reactivate a subscription scheduled for cancellation

403.description: Email not verified — carries the unverified email

200.description: Where to navigate after requesting a reset

post.summary: Apply a password reset using a token
Confirm a credential-login email (add password or re-point sign-in email)

409.description: Email already in use — link spent; request a new one from Profile

422.description: Validation failed or password required to finish adding sign-in

get.summary: Get a signed download or preview URL for a file/image item

400.description: Not a file or image item
